description: Set up branch ops/011-repo-consolidation from main and copy all TCU terminal legacy docs into docs/archive/tcu-terminal-legacy/
steps: Switch to main branch: git checkout main
Create and switch to new branch: git checkout -b ops/011-repo-consolidation

Copy all 12 files from /projects/sandbox/tcu-market-kitchen-terminal/docs/ into docs/archive/tcu-terminal-legacy/ (AGENT_BLOCKERS.md, KIRO_LOG.md, MASTER_PROMPT.md, ai-content-ecosystem-architecture.md, chatgpt-remotion-ecosystem-architect.md, master-inventory-notes.md, tcu-agent-rules.md, tcu-asset-manifest.md, tcu-character-canon.md, tcu-feature-priority.md, tcu-terminal-to-video-factory.md, tcu-visual-reference-map.md)
acceptance_criteria: Branch ops/011-repo-consolidation exists and is checked out
All 12 doc files from tcu-market-kitchen-terminal/docs/ exist in docs/archive/tcu-terminal-legacy/
verification: ls docs/archive/tcu-terminal-legacy/ shows all 12 doc files
findings: Branch created from main successfully. All 12 docs, 2 build-bibles, and validate-env.js copied. Files not yet staged or committed per orchestrator instructions.
